SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.corrosion

Class PipeSegmentIntegrity

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.corrosion.PipeSegmentIntegrity
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class PipeSegmentIntegrity extends Object implements Serializable
Flow-coupled per-segment integrity screening that combines CO2 corrosion and mineral-scale risk along a pipeline or flowline profile.

Most corrosion and scaling screening is evaluated at a single bulk condition. In reality both threats vary strongly along a line as temperature, pressure and velocity change: corrosion peaks where the wall shear and low-pH water combine, while CaCO3 scale peaks where CO2 breaks out and temperature rises. This class walks a supplied set of segments (each with its own temperature, pressure, velocity and diameter) and, for every segment, evaluates:

  • the NorsokM506CorrosionRate CO2 corrosion rate (mm/yr) at the local conditions, and
  • the CaCO3 saturation index from an ElectrolyteScaleCalculator on the shared brine chemistry, optionally converted to a scale growth rate with ScaleKinetics.

It then reports the worst corrosion segment and the worst scale segment, so an investigation can locate where mitigation (inhibitor, material upgrade, insulation) is most needed. The pH per segment is taken from a robust estimate (supplied brine pH, else a CO2-water correlation via RobustAqueousPH).

This is a screening-level integrator (NORSOK M-506, NACE TM0374, NORSOK M-001 informational), intended for relative ranking of segments rather than absolute mass-balance prediction.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:
  • NorsokM506CorrosionRate
  • ElectrolyteScaleCalculator
  • ScaleKinetics

  • Constructor Details

    • PipeSegmentIntegrity

      public PipeSegmentIntegrity()

  • Method Details

    • setProfile

      public PipeSegmentIntegrity setProfile(double[] temperatureC, double[] pressureBara, double[] velocityMs)
      Sets the per-segment temperature, pressure and velocity profiles. The three arrays must be the same length.
      Parameters:
      temperatureC - segment temperatures in degrees Celsius
      pressureBara - segment pressures in bara
      velocityMs - segment velocities in m/s
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • fromPipe

      public PipeSegmentIntegrity fromPipe(PipeBeggsAndBrills pipe)
      Extracts the temperature, pressure, mixture-velocity profile and diameter from a run PipeBeggsAndBrills so the integrity screening follows the same discretisation as the hydraulic model.

      The pipe must already have been run so its profile lists are populated. Segment temperatures are converted from Kelvin to degrees Celsius and the mixture superficial velocity is used as the segment velocity. The pipe diameter overrides any value previously set via setPipeAndGas(double, double); the CO2 mole fraction and brine chemistry must still be supplied separately.

      Parameters:
      pipe - a run Beggs-and-Brills pipeline; must not be null
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • setPipeAndGas

      public PipeSegmentIntegrity setPipeAndGas(double diameterM, double co2MoleFraction)
      Sets the pipe internal diameter and gas CO2 mole fraction.
      Parameters:
      diameterM - pipe internal diameter in metres
      co2MoleFraction - CO2 mole fraction in the gas phase (0 to 1)
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • setInhibitorEfficiency

      public PipeSegmentIntegrity setInhibitorEfficiency(double efficiency)
      Sets the chemical inhibitor efficiency applied uniformly along the line.
      Parameters:
      efficiency - inhibitor efficiency (0 = none, 1 = perfect)
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • setBrineChemistry

      public PipeSegmentIntegrity setBrineChemistry(double caMgL, double hco3MgL, double so4MgL, double baMgL, double naMgL, double clMgL)
      Sets the shared brine chemistry used to evaluate the CaCO3 saturation index at each segment.
      Parameters:
      caMgL - calcium [mg/L]
      hco3MgL - bicarbonate [mg/L]
      so4MgL - sulphate [mg/L]
      baMgL - barium [mg/L]
      naMgL - sodium [mg/L]
      clMgL - chloride [mg/L]
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • setBrinePH

      public PipeSegmentIntegrity setBrinePH(double pH)
      Sets the brine pH. Set to -1 (the default) to use a CO2-water correlation per segment.
      Parameters:
      pH - the aqueous pH, or -1 to correlate from local CO2 partial pressure
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • evaluate

      public PipeSegmentIntegrity evaluate()
      Walks each segment, evaluating the CO2 corrosion rate and CaCO3 scale saturation, and records the worst segments.
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • getSegments

      public List<PipeSegmentIntegrity.SegmentResult> getSegments()
      Gets the list of per-segment results.
      Returns:
      the per-segment integrity results

    • getWorstCorrosionIndex

      public int getWorstCorrosionIndex()
      Gets the index of the segment with the highest corrosion rate.
      Returns:
      the worst corrosion segment index, or -1 if no segments were evaluated

    • getWorstScaleIndex

      public int getWorstScaleIndex()
      Gets the index of the segment with the highest scale saturation index.
      Returns:
      the worst scale segment index, or -1 if no segments were evaluated

    • getMaxCorrosionRateMmYr

      public double getMaxCorrosionRateMmYr()
      Gets the maximum corrosion rate across all segments.
      Returns:
      the maximum corrosion rate in mm/yr

    • getMaxScaleSI

      public double getMaxScaleSI()
      Gets the maximum CaCO3 saturation index across all segments.
      Returns:
      the maximum CaCO3 saturation index

    • ensureEvaluated

      private void ensureEvaluated()
      Ensures evaluate() has been called before returning a result.

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Serialises the per-segment results and worst-case summary to a JSON string.
      Returns:
      a pretty-printed JSON representation
